case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ANTONIO GARCIA SERRATO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO DEC-3-2019 AT 10 A.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRATO, ANTONIO GARCIA $591.83 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $671.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SERRATO, ANTONIO GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY WITHOUT PROOF OF SERVICE. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO OCT-01-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-03-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDAN TANTONIO GARCIA SERRATO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-04-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MS.JOSAPHINA FLORES. DEFENDANT ANOTNIO GARCIA SERRATO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
